title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Oberoi Mall - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Oberoi Mall - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Oberoi Mall, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Ahmedabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Oberoi Mall:
Oberoi Mall is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Mall!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
